description: CompositionKhakhi grey trousers made of cotton blend fabric, that has flat front with two insert pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with buttoned closures, plastic zipper and button closure, loops on the waist to secure a belt and extended hems that can be trimmed to suit the wearer's heightFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold in 30 degree waterWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach or wringAvoid soaking, remove promptlyLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on prints or embellishmentsUpgrade your sophisticated style with these khakhi grey trousers from basics. The cotton blend fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day, while the classic cut of the trousers make it perfect for casual and semi-formal wear. Team these with  slim fit shirts or polo neck tees and leather slip-ons for a well groomed look.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 44""Height-6.3& rdquo , Waist & ndash 32& rdquo
